steps.title: Track the tested variable
steps.content: The first ad varied by detail level: some participants saw a less detailed ad, while others saw a more detailed ad. Their reactions to the same second ad differed afterward.

steps.title: Name the affecting factor
steps.content: Choice A mentions viewer count, which was not tested. Choice B mentions viewing time, which was not varied. Choice D mentions time of day, which is absent from the study. The conclusion should identify the amount of detail in previous ads. The answer is C.
